languages.text: "Лорд-капитан, станция прервала вокс-тишину". {n}В искаженном вокс-системой голосе Вигдис слышится легкое удивление.{/n} "С вами желает говорить {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Магос{/g} Логистикатор Алтаря-Темплума, Тетрия-Лемма".

traits.locale_text: "Лорд-капитан, станция прервала вокс-тишину". {n}В искаженном вокс-системой голосе Вигдис слышится легкое удивление.{/n} "С вами желает говорить {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Магос{/g} Логистикатор Алтаря-Темплума, Тетрия-Лемма".

languages.text: "Lord Captain, the station has broken vox-silence." {n}You can hear the slight surprise in Vigdis's vox-distorted voice.{/n} "The {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Logis of Altar-Templum, Tetria-Lemma, wishes to speak with you."
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан, станция прервала вокс-тишину". {n}В искаженном вокс-системой голосе Вигдис слышится легкое удивление.{/n} "С вами желает говорить {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Магос{/g} Логистикатор Алтаря-Темплума, Тетрия-Лемма".

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, the station has broken vox-silence." {n}You can hear the slight surprise in Vigdis's vox-distorted voice.{/n} "The {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Logis of Altar-Templum, Tetria-Lemma, wishes to speak with you."

"Lord Captain, the station has broken vox-silence." {n}You can hear the slight surprise in Vigdis's vox-distorted voice.{/n} "The Magos Logis of Altar-Templum, Tetria-Lemma, wishes to speak with you."

"Lord Captain, the station has broken vox-silence." {n}You can hear the slight surprise in Vigdis's vox-distorted voice.{/n} "The Magos Logis of Altar-Templum, Tetria-Lemma, wishes to speak with you."

languages.text: 「艦長、通信が途絶えました 」{n}ヴィグディスの通信が歪んでいるのが分かります。{/n}「アルター・テンプラムのテトリア・レマのマグオス・ロギスが、あなたと話すことを望んでいます。」
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, the station has broken vox-silence." {n}You can hear the slight surprise in Vigdis's vox-distorted voice.{/n} "The Magos Logis of Altar-Templum, Tetria-Lemma, wishes to speak with you."

traits.locale_text: 「艦長、通信が途絶えました。 」{n}ヴィグディスの通信が歪んでいるのが分かります。{n}「アルター・テンプラムのテトリア・レマのマグオス・ロギスが、あなたと話すことを望んでいます。」

languages.text: «Lord Capitán la estación ha roto el silencio de voco». {n}Oyes un leve tono de sorpresa en la voz de Vigdis, distorsionada por el voco.{/n} «El {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}magos{/g} logos de Altar-Templum, Tetria-Lemma, quiere hablar con usted».
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, the station has broken vox-silence." {n}You can hear the slight surprise in Vigdis's vox-distorted voice.{/n} "The {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Logis of Altar-Templum, Tetria-Lemma, wishes to speak with you."

traits.locale_text: «Lord Capitán la estación ha roto el silencio de voco». {n}Oyes un leve tono de sorpresa en la voz de Vigdis, distorsionada por el voco.{/n} «El magos logos de Altar-Templum, Tetria-Lemma, quiere hablar con usted».

languages.text: "Lord Captain, die Station hat die Voxstille gebrochen." {n}Du erkennst eine leichte Überraschung in Vigdis' vom Vox verzerrter Stimme.{/n} "Der {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Logis von Altar-Templum, Tetria-Lemma, wünscht Euch zu sprechen."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, the station has broken vox-silence." {n}You can hear the slight surprise in Vigdis's vox-distorted voice.{/n} "The {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Logis of Altar-Templum, Tetria-Lemma, wishes to speak with you."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, die Station hat die Voxstille gebrochen." {n}Du erkennst eine leichte Überraschung in Vigdis' vom Vox verzerrter Stimme.{/n} "Der Magos Logis von Altar-Templum, Tetria-Lemma, wünscht Euch zu sprechen."

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, la station a brisé le silence-vox. {n}Vous notez une touche de surprise dans la voix légèrement distordue de Vigdis.{/n} Le {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}magos{/g} logis d'Altar-Templum, Tetria-Lemma, souhaite s'entretenir avec vous. »
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, the station has broken vox-silence." {n}You can hear the slight surprise in Vigdis's vox-distorted voice.{/n} "The {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Logis of Altar-Templum, Tetria-Lemma, wishes to speak with you."

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, la station a brisé le silence-vox. {n}Vous notez une touche de surprise dans la voix légèrement distordue de Vigdis.{/n} Le magos logis d'Altar-Templum, Tetria-Lemma, souhaite s'entretenir avec vous. »

languages.text: “舰长大人，星站的音阵静默已被打破。”{n}从维格迪斯那因音阵而失真的声音中，你能听出一丝细微的讶异。{/n}“祭坛的逻辑士{g|Encyclopedia:Magos}贤者{/g}，特特里亚-莱玛，希望与您通话。”
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, the station has broken vox-silence." {n}You can hear the slight surprise in Vigdis's vox-distorted voice.{/n} "The {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Logis of Altar-Templum, Tetria-Lemma, wishes to speak with you."

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，星站的音阵静默已被打破。”{n}从维格迪斯那因音阵而失真的声音中，你能听出一丝细微的讶异。{/n}“祭坛的逻辑士贤者，特特里亚-莱玛，希望与您通话。”

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan, istasyon voks sessizliğini bozdu." {n}Vigdis'in voksla bozulmuş sesindeki hafif şaşkınlığı duyabiliyorsun.{/n} "Altar-Templum'un {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Logis'i Tetria-Lemma, sizinle konuşmak istiyor."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, the station has broken vox-silence." {n}You can hear the slight surprise in Vigdis's vox-distorted voice.{/n} "The {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g} Logis of Altar-Templum, Tetria-Lemma, wishes to speak with you."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Kaptan, istasyon voks sessizliğini bozdu." {n}Vigdis'in voksla bozulmuş sesindeki hafif şaşkınlığı duyabiliyorsun.{/n} "Altar-Templum'un Magos Logis'i Tetria-Lemma, sizinle konuşmak istiyor."
